response.justification: The candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with TypeScript/Node.js and DLang experience, but the role's core requirement of 8 years of C++ is essentially unmet — only a ~6-month stint at National Instruments (2014–2015) involved C/C++. There is also limited evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform work, distributed-systems infrastructure at the scale implied, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. The profile points toward product/web engineering rather than internal compute platform leadership.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practice
Some low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s)
Demonstrated mentoring via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course delivery
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months — far short of the 8-year minimum
No clear production cloud compute platform architecture or ownership
No explicit technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Limited large-scale cloud compute platform / distributed infra ownership
Mentoring and engineering-practice advocacy track record
